hooks.command: pnpm lint:fix > /dev/null 2>&1; OUTPUT=$(pnpm lint 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUTPUT"; exit 1; fi
OUTPUT=$(pnpm check 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUTPUT"; exit 1; fi

OUTPUT=$(pnpm coverage 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUTPUT"; exit 1; fi; CLEAN=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | perl -pe 's/\e\[\d+(?:;\d+)*m//g'); if echo "$CLEAN" | awk -F'|' '/\|/ && !/^-/ && !/File/ { for(i=2;i<=5;i++) { gsub(/[[:space:]]/,"",$i); if($i!="" && $i+0!=100) { found=1 } } } END { exit !found }'; then echo "Coverage is not 100%. Fix the uncovered lines:"; echo "$CLEAN" | grep '|'; exit 1; fi
